title: Minutes
doc_html:
§1279.  Minutes

The secretary-treasurer shall keep full and correct minutes of the meetings and final actions of the authority, which minutes shall be open to the inspection of the public at all reasonable times.  

Acts 1954, No. 232, §29.
doc_text:
§1279.  Minutes
The secretary-treasurer shall keep full and correct minutes of the meetings and final actions of the authority, which minutes shall be open to the inspection of the public at all reasonable times.
Acts 1954, No. 232, §29.
